variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 190190 Air Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 60016
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SA 190190 Air Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 60016
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SA 190190 Air Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 60016. Easy to install and replace, the SA 190190 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
